samples.xml_description:
<module id="freq_div">
    <description>Frequency Divider for generating different clock frequencies based on input clock signal.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="CLK_in">Input clock signal.</input>
        <input id="RST">Reset signal.</input>
        <output id="CLK_50">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 2.</output>
        <output id="CLK_10">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 10.</output>
        <output id="CLK_1">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 100.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>Three counters are used to generate different clock frequencies based on input clock signal.</implementation>
    
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <reg id="cnt_10" width_description="[3:0]">Counter for generating CLK_10.</reg>
        <reg id="cnt_100" width_description="[6:0]">Counter for generating CLK_1.</reg>
        
        <always @(posedge CLK_in or posedge RST)> 
            if(RST) begin
                cnt_10 <= 4'd0;
                cnt_100 <= 7'd0;
            end else begin
                if(cnt_10 == 4'd4) begin
                    cnt_10 <= 4'd0;
                end else begin
                    cnt_10 <= cnt_10 + 1;
                end
                
                if(cnt_100 == 7'd49) begin
                    cnt_100 <= 7'd0;
                end else begin
                    cnt_100 <= cnt_100 + 1;
                end
            end
        </always>
        
        <assign CLK_50 = ~CLK_50;
        <assign CLK_10 = (cnt_10 == 4'd4) ? ~CLK_10 : CLK_10;
        <assign CLK_1 = (cnt_100 == 7'd49) ? ~CLK_1 : CLK_1;
    </logic_description>
endmodule
